name: conditional-get contract: a 200 refreshes the stored headers to the new etag value
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/standards/conditional-get.sh" --source-id aws --store-dir "$PWD/s" --simulate-status 200 --etag old-etag --body-hash h1 >/dev/null 2>&1; bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/standards/conditional-get.sh" --source-id aws --store-dir "$PWD/s" --simulate-status 200 --etag new-etag --body-hash h2 >/dev/null 2>&1; grep -q new-etag "$PWD/s/aws.json" && ! grep -q old-etag "$PWD/s/aws.json" && echo refreshed 1>&2
